title: Peruvian Smoky Chicken Salad
description: A flavorful salad featuring smoky chicken, crispy vegetables, and a tangy Peruvian twist.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Grill the chicken breast for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
In a large bowl, combine the crispy corn tortilla, Peruvian corn, and mixed salad greens.
Add the sliced chicken to the bowl and toss to combine.
Dice the fresh tomato and add it to the salad.
Squeeze a lime wedge over the salad and toss to coat.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
